title: Japan Extended
description: This mod is about Japanese armor, weapons, and daily life
body:
This mod offers a wide range of useful tools: pickaxes, axes, shovels, hoes, and armor. Additionally, the mod features two katanas made of Japanese steel "tamahagane", bokken - a training sword. And other objects of Japanese culture.

Craft recipes:
Tamachagane ingot:

![tamachagane ingot](https://i.postimg.cc/bYnZqTdY/crafting-grid-7.png)

Bokken blade:

![https://i.postimg.cc/5y8ypxDQ/crafting-grid-8.png](https://i.postimg.cc/5y8ypxDQ/crafting-grid-8.png)

Wooden handle:

![https://i.postimg.cc/wvC3ht4d/crafting-grid-9.png](https://i.postimg.cc/wvC3ht4d/crafting-grid-9.png)

bamboo carpet:

![https://i.postimg.cc/vBYcpDvt/bamboo-carpet-craft.png](https://i.postimg.cc/vBYcpDvt/bamboo-carpet-craft.png)

kasa:

![https://i.postimg.cc/RZgv5z02/crafting-grid-11.png](https://i.postimg.cc/RZgv5z02/crafting-grid-11.png)

P.S The process of crafting items not depicted in the images is analogous to the crafting process in vanilla Minecraft (only the resources used are changed)
